ulasan.Ulasan: Formerly called "Seaside Bank," United Community continues to offer an exceptional degree of personal service. You will never hear "Press 1 for English" when you call. A real person always answers the phone.  You are greeted by name when you arrive, and wont have to wait in line and listen to other people on their phones. Their lobby has a splendid view of the St Lucie River. You conduct your business while seated in a quiet atmosphere reminiscent of a private bank.  Staff is friendly, and have excellent professional skills too. If they were still called "Seaside Bank," I would rate them 100. But they are a strong 99.  :)
ulasan.teks_final: formerly called seaside bank united community continues to offer an exceptional degree of personal service you will never hear press for english when you call real person always answers the phone you are greeted by name when you arrive and wont have to wait in line and listen to other people on their phones their lobby has splendid view of the st lucie river you conduct your business while seated in quiet atmosphere reminiscent of private bank staff is friendly and have excellent professional skills too if they were still called seaside bank would rate them but they are strong

ulasan.Ulasan: Banker will not give me my bank account number. I do not know why. I cannot enroll in on-line banking without it as they insist on having my bank account number in the sign up. Since I DID open a bank account in the Stuart, FL bank, how do I get my bank number since it takes 7-10 days to get my plastic Debit card?

ulasan.Ulasan: Worked in the financial industry for over 20 years and United Community is a true hidden gem.  Wonderful service and varied products available.
ulasan.teks_final: worked in the financial industry for over years and united community is true hidden gem wonderful service and varied products available

ulasan.Ulasan: My adult daughter and I went to change our addresses.  It was our first visit to First Community Bank in the city to which we are moving.  The bank was downtown, but we pleased to find parking inside their lot. We were met with smiles and received quick service from Jesse Wilton who facilitated the address changes and other transactions.  Since they do not have branch banks, he explained where we would find ATMs out in the community. It was a pleasant and flawless experience.
